name: @flying-pillow/mission-workspace
description: Mission workspace and filesystem manager for the full monorepo.

scripts.airport:status: pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=@flying-pillow/tower-terminal && node apps/tower/terminal/build/index.js airport:status
scripts.mission: pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=@flying-pillow/tower-terminal && MISSION_GATE_ID=dashboard node apps/tower/terminal/build/index.js
scripts.test:daemon-mission: pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=@flying-pillow/tower-terminal && pnpm exec tsx apps/tower/terminal/src/scripts/daemonMissionSmokeTest.ts
scripts.test:workflow-e2e: pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=@flying-pillow/tower-terminal && pnpm exec tsx apps/tower/terminal/src/scripts/daemonCurrentWorkflowE2eTest.ts
